title: Document an API Endpoint
description: Write reference docs for one HTTP endpoint.
content:
Document this endpoint: {{endpoint}}

Cover: method and path, what it does in one line, parameters (path/query/body) with types and which are required, the request and a realistic response example, the status codes and what each means, auth, and rate limits. Show one full working example a reader can copy. Note the non-obvious behavior — pagination, idempotency, side effects — that callers get wrong. Be precise about error responses.
